positive: A stylized, highly detailed minimalist illustration of a celestial body—a crescent moon nestled within swirling nebula clouds, with vibrant cosmic dust resembling deep sapphire and rich amethyst. The composition should feature a strong central silhouette of the moon, contrasted against luminous golden stardust trails. Incorporate Art Deco-inspired geometric linework and mandalas subtly embedded within the nebulous structure. The overall aesthetic should be luxurious, dreamy, and graphic, suitable for high-contrast apparel printing. Clean vector lines, deep jewel tones, symmetrical composition, negative space utilization, ethereal glow, cosmic abstract.
